title: AbbVie Acquires Apogee for $10.9 Billion
headline: AbbVie announces its largest deal in more than half a decade, acquiring Apogee Therapeutics for ~$10.9 billion to gain long-acting autoimmune/immune disease drug candidates.
key_facts: Deal value: ~$10.9 billion (year's second-largest biotech buyout); AbbVie's largest deal since $63B Allergan acquisition in 2019; APGE stock +46.66%; ABBV stock +6.25%; pipeline includes Dupixent competitor with mega-blockbuster potential

title: CARsgen's Gastric Cancer CAR-T Wins World-First Solid Tumor Approval
headline: CARsgen's Claudin18.2-targeted CAR-T therapy receives Chinese approval for gastric cancer, becoming the first CAR-T globally approved for a solid tumor.
key_facts: First CAR-T approved globally for a solid tumor indication; Claudin18.2 target; gastric cancer indication; Chinese regulatory approval; landmark milestone

title: HHS Rolls Out Sweeping Clinical Trial Reforms
headline: HHS announces broad clinical trial reforms framed as countering China's biotech influence, with RFK Jr. making the announcement.
key_facts: Announced ~4 hours before June 22 snapshot; framed as measures to counter China biotech influence; RFK Jr. as HHS Secretary making announcement; part of broader US-China decoupling trend

title: Merck's IBD Drug Achieves First Phase 3 Win
headline: Merck's inflammatory bowel disease drug acquired through its $10.8 billion Prometheus Biosciences acquisition achieves its first Phase 3 victory.
key_facts: Prometheus acquisition cost: $10.8 billion; IBD asset achieves first Phase 3 win; MRK stock +1.41%; validates Merck's precision medicine approach to IBD

title: Moderna Stock Drops 7.22% Despite FDA Panel Win
headline: Moderna shares fall 7.22% despite having recently received unanimous VRBPAC support for mFlusiva flu vaccine.
key_facts: MRNA -7.22% on June 22; recent unanimous VRBPAC vote support; mFlusiva PDUFA date August 5, 2026; reason for drop unclear (profit-taking or market rotation)

title: Kardigan IPO Extends 2026 Biotech IPO Streak
headline: Kardigan heart drug developer, having raised $400 million in IPO proceeds, becomes fourth biotech in 2026 to raise ≥$400M in IPO.
key_facts: $400 million raised in IPO; KARD +3.50%; fourth biotech in 2026 to raise ≥$400M; most in single year since 2021

title: Bionyra Launches with $165M Series A
headline: $165 million Series A for next-generation immune drugs founded by Sanofi alum with I&I candidates from China.
key_facts: $165 million Series A raise; founded by Sanofi immunology R&D alum; next-gen immune drug candidates with China origin

title: cAMPfield Launches with $180M for IBD Drug
headline: $180 million raise for gut disease IBD drug with next-gen safety profile from vTv Therapeutics.
key_facts: $180 million raise; IBD/gut disease focus; originated from vTv Therapeutics; touting better side effect profile

title: MacroGenics Rises on Sanofi Milestone Payment
headline: MacroGenics (MGNX) rises 10.90% on milestone payment from Sanofi related to TZIELD approval.
key_facts: MGNX +10.90%; Sanofi milestone payment related to TZIELD approval

title: Pfizer-Innovent $10B Deal: 5-Month Sprint Inside the Acquisition
headline: Inside Pfizer's $10 billion deal with Innovent: the commercial and strategic rationale behind a 5-month acquisition sprint.
key_facts: $10 billion Pfizer-Innovent deal; 5-month acquisition timeline; featured strategic deep-dive by Fierce Biotech
